title: croton tiliifolius
intro: Croton tiliifolius, also known as the Croton bush or Javanese Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Croton tiliifolius include its ability to relieve pain and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
